name: Graincorp Limited
analysis: GNC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 41% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$5.2400, stop A$4.8312, target A$5.9600 (1.76:1) — then trail it.
